events.title: Sthala Ubud Village Jazz Festival 2026
events.description: The 13th edition of Ubud's premier jazz festival across 3 stages and 2 evenings at Sthala Ubud Bali. Featuring 100+ musicians including Dattie Do Duo ft. Warman Sanjaya & Sinuksma (Vietnam/Indonesia) and Jadi Peperzak Quartet ft. Kasyfi Kalyasyena (Netherlands/Indonesia/Nepal). One of Ubud's longest-running annual music celebrations — full schedule at ubudvillagejazzfestival.com.
events.short_description: The 13th Ubud Village Jazz Festival: 3 stages, 100+ musicians over two evenings at Sthala Ubud Bali.

events.title: Ubud Folk Festival 2026
events.description: The 5th edition of the Ubud Folk Festival, themed 'Half a Decade of Harmony' — 2 days of folk and world music, art installations, community workshops, drum circles, a lantern parade, and an art market at Biji World Ubud. An annual celebration of music, creativity, and community that has grown into one of Ubud's beloved multi-day gatherings.
events.short_description: The 5th Ubud Folk Festival: two days of folk music, drum circles, art, workshops, and a lantern parade at Biji World Ubud.
